jobs.name: Morning Report
jobs.description: Daily morning pending tasks report at 10:00 UTC

payload.message: Run the morning report and send it to the #通知 channel: python3 /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/slack-morning-report.py

jobs.name: Railway Cost Reporter
jobs.description: Daily Railway usage cost report at 10:00 UTC

payload.message: Run the Railway cost reporter: python3 /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/railway-cost-reporter.py

jobs.name: Git Auto Pull
jobs.description: Periodic git pull to sync workspace from remote every 5 minutes

payload.message:
Run the following command and report the output:
git -C /home/node/.openclaw/workspace pull

jobs.name: Git Auto Push
jobs.description: Periodic git commit and push of agent files every 5 minutes

payload.message:
Check for changes in the agent workspace and commit/push if any exist.

1. Check status:
   git -C /home/node/.openclaw/workspace status --porcelain
2. If there are changes, run the following commands in order:
   git -C /home/node/.openclaw/workspace add AGENTS.md SOUL.md IDENTITY.md MEMORY.md HEARTBEAT.md TOOLS.md USER.md BOOTSTRAP.md openclaw.json memory/ skills/ 2>/dev/null || true
   git -C /home/node/.openclaw/workspace commit -m "chore: auto-sync [cron]"
   git -C /home/node/.openclaw/workspace push
3. If there are no changes, do nothing.

IMPORTANT: Never use `git add -A` or `git add .`. Only add the files explicitly listed above.

jobs.name: Supabase Cost Reporter
jobs.description: Daily Supabase estimated cost report at 10:05 UTC

payload.message: Run the Supabase cost reporter: python3 /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/supabase-cost-reporter.py
